data.title: Healthy Smiles Never Gets Old 2.0: New Report Highlights Oral Health Needs and Opportunities for California’s Growing Older Adult Population
data.description: A report on the oral health needs of older adults in California has been released by the Center for Oral Health, a nonprofit organization with 40 years of experience. The report focuses on identifying gaps and presenting solutions to improve oral health for older individuals in the state.
Clip Money Inc. Reports 2025 Year End Results

data.title: Economic Value of Family Caregiving in Mississippi Reaches $9.4 billion Annually, New AARP Report Shows
data.description: A recent report discovered that in Mississippi, approximately 690,000 family caregivers for adults dedicate a total of 620 million hours of care each year. The value of this work would amount to $9.4 billion annually if these caregivers were paid at market rates. This information was revealed in a report released on March 31, 2026, in Jackson.

data.title: Cavvy Energy reports exercise of warrants for over $500,000 in additional funding.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global market for electric vehicles (EVs) is expected to experience significant growth, with projections estimating a CAGR of 22.6% over the next five years. The market size in 2020 was $135.6 billion, and it is anticipated to reach $612.9 billion by 2026. The increasing demand for clean energy solutions, government initiatives promoting EV adoption, and advancements in battery technology are some of the key factors driving this growth. Additionally, the passenger vehicle segment is expected to hold the largest market share during this period. This trend underscores the growing shift towards sustainable transportation options worldwide.

data.title: ASA Gold and Precious Metals Limited Announces 90-Day Extension of Investment Advisory Agreement
data.description: In Portland, ME, ASA Gold and Precious Metals Limited (NYSE: ASA) has extended its Investment Advisory Agreement with Merk Investments LLC for 90 days starting from April 1, 2026. The Board of Directors also approved hiring Cantor Fitzgerald & Co. on March 31, 2026, aiming to enhance risk-adjusted investment returns and shareholder value.

data.title: Warren Buffett, Bill Gates Friendship On Hold After Epstein Files: 'Until It Gets Cleared Up'
data.description: Two of the wealthiest individuals globally, Bill Gates and Warren Buffett, have shared a friendship spanning over three decades primarily centered around their mutual passion for philanthropy. However, following revelations from the Epstein Files, Buffett disclosed in his first public statements post-file release that he has not communicated with Gates recently. The former CEO of Berkshire Hathaway discussed his retirement activities, views on fluctuating stock markets, and the status of his friendship with Gates during a recent interview. In a CNBC discussion with Becky Quick, Buffett mentioned that he has not had any contact with Gates in recent months since the Epstein Files surfaced. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Algernon Health Announces Proposed Name Change to “Grey Matters Health Inc.” and a 10:1 Share Consolidation
data.description: A Canadian healthcare company, Algernon Health Inc. (CSE: AGN) (FRANKFURT: AGW0) (OTCQB: AGNPF), based in Vancouver, plans to rebrand itself as Grey Matters Health Inc. The company has secured the new name and symbol "GREY" with the Canadian Securities Exchange. Details regarding the new symbols for the OTCQB and Frankfurt exchange will be disclosed later. The announcement was made on March 31, 2026.

data.title: NJ Bio, Inc. and Ajinomoto Bio‑Pharma Services Enter into Collaboration to Strengthen Support for Antibody-Drug Conjugate Development
data.description: A significant collaboration has been established between NJ Bio, Inc. ("NJ Bio") in Princeton, N.J., and Ajinomoto Bio-Pharma Services ("Aji Bio-Pharma") in Tokyo, as of April 1, 2026. Both companies are key players in their respective fields - NJ Bio specializing in integrated drug discovery and development services, while Aji Bio-Pharma excels in biopharmaceutical manufacturing services and platform expertise. This partnership marks a pivotal moment in the industry, bringing together top talents and resources from two leading entities in the biopharmaceutical sector. Stay tuned for further developments stemming from this collaboration.

data.title: America Just Classified Silver as a Critical Mineral. The Company Sitting on 36 Million Ounces in Nevada Is About to Start Drilling.
data.description: Americore Resources Corp announced on March 31, 2026, that the U.S. Geological Survey included silver in the Critical Minerals List in November 2025. Following this, China enforced a total prohibition on silver exports in January 2026. The move by China came as a surprise to many in the industry, especially as the country is one of the largest producers of silver globally. This decision is expected to have significant implications for the global silver market, as China's ban could potentially disrupt the supply chain and lead to higher prices due to limited availability. Silver prices have already shown an upward trend since the announcement, with experts predicting further increases in the coming months. The ban has also prompted discussions among other countries about diversifying sources for silver to prevent supply shortages and price fluctuations.

data.title: Prairie Provident Resources Announces Fourth Quarter and Year-End 2025 Financial and Operating Results and 2025 Year End Reserves
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, Prairie Provident Resources Inc. (TSX:PPR) has released its financial and operational outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year by the end of December 31, 2025, in addition to its year-end reserves. The Company's audited consolidated financial statements for the year ending December 31, 2025, and the corresponding Management's Discussion and Analysis are included in the Annual Information Form dated March 31, 2026, which presents the year-end reserves data and other relevant information for the period. Interested parties can access these documents on Prairie Provident's website at www.ppr.ca and on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca.

data.title: Palico Cuts Secondaries Fees to 5bps Above $50M
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in New York, Palico announced a significant advancement in the secondary market. They have introduced a new pricing model where transactions exceeding $50 million will incur a fee of only 5 basis points. This move signifies a transformative approach aimed at emphasizing scalability and streamlining operations.

data.title: Trump plans to withdraw US troops from Iran in 2-3 weeks after escalating tensions in February with strikes by US and Israel.
data.description: The situation in Iran has been persistent since tensions heightened in February, subsequent to US and Israeli attacks on the country.
